results.title: Again, Nigeria Week London honours Marvin Nmah
results.description: Nigerian Afro-Adura artiste, Ayotola Marvellous Nmah, popularly known as Marvin Nmah, has been invited to serve as a special guest presenter at the forthcoming Nigeria Week London 2026, a year after quietly receiving the platform’s Fast Rising Artiste Award. The post Again, Nigeria Week London honours Marvin Nmah appeared first on The Sun Nigeria .

Consulate General of India in Shanghai hosts International Day of Yoga at Bund Finance Centre
results.description: Shanghai's historic Bund was the vibrant setting for India's 12th International Day of Yoga celebration. Over 400 attendees, including diplomats and diaspora members, embraced the "Yoga for Healthy Ageing" theme. Consul General Pratik Mathur highlighted the event's significance, marking the culmination of 90 days of yoga-focused activities across China, underscoring the enduring Indo-China connection.

results.title: Raiders WR Jack Bech hosts free youth football camp at STM
results.description: Las Vegas Raiders WR Jack Bech hosted a free youth football camp at Cougar Stadium at his alma mater St. Thomas More. The event brought together more than 150 campers and featured Bech's former LSU teammates, including Garrett Nussmeier and Maason Smith.
